scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.vercel-build: npx prisma generate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && (npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260529143046_v9_init --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma 2>/dev/null || true) && (npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma || echo 'Migration warning — continuing build') && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
